content: Mission RFC enforcement via CHECK constraints: MissionState ('active'|'frozen'|'completed'|'failed'|'cancelled') and MissionPhase ('understand'|'align'|'decide'|'plan'|'execute'|'done') are enforced at table creation time in store.ts CREATE TABLE, ensuring database integrity and preventing invalid state transitions at the SQL level.

description: Mission CLI silent failure: missionStop bundle export errors don't set exit code
resolution: Set process.exitCode=1 on bundle export failure in missionStop() at line 490

description: Orphaned mission record if analyst startup fails
resolution: Add try/finally cleanup to remove mission if startMissionAnalyst fails in missionStart()

name: rate-limit-dashboard mission execution
description: 4-workstream mission (throttle types, CLI command, policy engine, spawn guard) completed in ~30min with all clean Tier 1 merges. Well-designed substrate (headroom types/store/adapter) enabled focused workstreams. Pure function policy pattern and capability-based priority mapping were clean design choices.

name: Mission: rate-limit-dashboard-23
description: Objective: Implement rate-limit dashboard and adaptive throttling (GitHub #23). Build on shipped headroom substrate (#34). Scope: 1) ov rate-limits --live command consuming HeadroomSnapshot. 2) Enhanced headroom display in status/dashboard. 3) Adaptive throttling policy - slow/pause low-priority agents when headroom drops below configurable threshold. 4) Feed headroom pressure into scheduling logic. Design: complement existing wait/swap, support unknown/estimated states.. Agents: 3 (coordinator-mission, mission-analyst, execution-director). Tokens: 3,980in/200,702out ($97.01).
